title: Change "only if item is in group" to "only if item is / is not in group"
excerpt: We have an automation tied to ‘when item is created’ and want to put the condition 'only if item is not in group. Currently you can only select is which isn’t useful in this situation as items import from another boar…

posts.author: timashelford (Tim Ashelford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-07-09 at 9.49.27 am984×544 23.5 KB

We have an automation tied to ‘when item is created’ and want to put the condition 'only if item is not in group. Currently you can only select is which isn’t useful in this situation as items import from another board into that Sponsored Articles group.

Please vote for this simple feature!

posts.author: gilliankelly (Gillian Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree Tim, I was surprised this wasn’t an option!
